summary: Legal Pages & GatheringsPage Refactoring Test Complete - All features verified. Privacy Policy page (/privacy) renders with 10 sections, Terms of Service page (/terms) renders with 13 sections. Legal links present in Landing page footer, Auth page footer, Settings page legal section, and AppShell sidebar. GatheringsPage loads correctly after refactoring 953-line file into 8 sub-components.

GatheringsPage was refactored from 953 lines to ~477 lines main file + 8 sub-components in /gatherings/ directory. All sub-component panels load correctly when an event is selected.
